name: SHUTTLE_Engine_OMS
title: Orbital Maneuvering System Engine
description: The AJ10-190 hypergolic engine used for the Shuttle Orbiter's Orbital Maneuvering System. Provides thrust for orbital insertion, rendezvous, and deorbit burns.

name: SSME_CENTER
title: Space Shuttle Main Engine (Center)
description: The center Space Shuttle Main Engine (RS-25). A high-performance staged-combustion LH2/LOX engine used in clusters of three on the Shuttle Orbiter's aft fuselage.

name: ShuttleOrbiter
title: Shuttle Orbiter
description: The Space Shuttle Orbiter, comprising the crew cabin, fuselage, engine mount, and delta wings as a single integrated assembly. Features a custom aerodynamic model derived from NASA technical documents for realistic lift and drag during reentry and landing.

name: ShuttleSSME
title: Space Shuttle Main Engine (Outboard)
description: An outboard Space Shuttle Main Engine (RS-25). A high-performance staged-combustion LH2/LOX engine used in clusters of three on the Shuttle Orbiter's aft fuselage.
